programme.title: ¡Que viene mi marido!
programme.desc: Carita inherits 5 million pesos from her godfather but she will not receive the money until she marries and her husband dies. She, her parents and boyfriend decide the a married with a dying man will be the solution of the problem. So, Carita marries Lazaro (who is dying)accepts the situation, but when he sees his fiancé, he recovers health. Lazaro disappear because he was unable to fulfill his compromise. Some days later a newspaper announces Lazaro's death. Nevertheless he reappears suddenly and explains that he is not Lazaro, the real one has died so Carita is a widow and can receive her inheritance. Lazaro and Carita fall in love and marry.

programme.title: Nuevo objetivo
programme.desc: Arriaga desenmascara a Odette. Niki cree q Guzmán defendió a su amante. Tomasina lleva el cheque al papá de Guzmán. Kendra visita a Niki para ir a visitar un diseñador. Tiene un plan para secuestrar a Niki.

programme.title: Nikki secuestrada
programme.desc: Descubren q Niki y Kendra Han sido secuestradas. Salcero quiere dirigir la negociación del secuestro. Piden dinero para dejarla libre. Beatrix quiere trabajar y Cristina ofrece ayuda con Guillo.

programme.title: Culpable del secuestro
programme.desc: Salcero está en contacto con espanto manejando el secuestro. Kendra y salcero conversan q harán con el rescate. Cristina y Aníbal se conocen. Salcero culpa a Guzmán del secuestro.

programme.title: Rescate
programme.desc: Niki atenta escape pero por salvar a Kendra se rinde. Kendra da instrucciones a Espanto de cómo repartirán el botín. Guzmán consigue la dirección de los secuestradores. El y Arriaga van al rescate.

programme.title: Traición y venganza
programme.desc: Salcero previene a Espanto y escapan. Jonas propone a espanto quedarse con el dinero. Arriaga y Guzmán acompañan a Victoria a entregar el rescate.

programme.title: Primer beso
programme.desc: Recuperan a Niki. Kendra feliz se cree rica. Jonás y Espanto traicionan a Kendra. Nelson se va a ver a Kendra. Ella logra q se quede a pasar la noche. Arriaga besa a Victoria mientras ella duerme.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Enfermedad al descubierto
programme.desc: Guzmán descubre q Niki tiene una enfermedad. Niki se entera q Lili trabaja en su casa de jardinera. Aníbal se entera del secuestro. Arriaga lleva a Victoria a la casa del lago para descansar con Nelson.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Amor consumado
programme.desc: Nelson se queda con Kendra. Le dice a Victoria q se regrese a la casa. Cristina enfurece de celos y pelea con Arriaga. Guzmán quiere qniki vea un especialista.

programme.title: The Painted Parademic
programme.desc: When a paramedic and mother is found dead and covered in paint in the basement of her Massachusetts home, investigators must work tirelessly for 18 months to find the person responsible.

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: In Southwest Florida, Terrance Williams, a young father, disappears. As his mother retraces his steps she uncovers something ominous: the last known person to see Terrance alive has a strange and disturbing connection to another missing man.

programme.title: It Could Have Been Me
programme.desc: Two teenage girls fall for men who seem to care about them. Instead, the girls are lured into human trafficking and coerced into prostitution.

programme.title: Wife's Double Life
programme.desc: When a young husband is thrown in jail for the murder of his newlywed wife, most people in their small Oklahoma community believed the case was solved. But odd cell tower records and surprising DNA evidence force investigators to take a second look.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: In St. Petersburg, Florida, Cabretti Wheeler and his friend Kyle Ellis are killed. When the only eye-witness vanishes, it's up to Cabretti's mom, Lisa Wheeler, to help police solve the case, even if it means risking her own life for justice.

programme.title: Speaking from the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret Purk is just days away from having her first baby when, after an apparent suicide by hanging, she and her unborn son are dead. Twenty-four years later, new clues lead investigators to re-open the case. Was this suicide actually a homicide?

programme.title: The Vanishing Clerk
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Eyes Like Daddy
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Living in Sin
programme.desc: Two female nursing assistants in a devout community fall in love. Tragedy strikes when the burden of reconciling sexuality and faith becomes too much.

programme.title: Primera palabra
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: El bautizo
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento? Benito abandona la vecindad por siempre.

programme.title: No se vende
programme.desc: La dueña del edificio falleció y sus dos hijas, 'Maty' y 'Mony' se lo disputan, dejando en medio a los vecinos y a punto de ser desalojados.

programme.title: Regresó Ale
programme.desc: Ale regresa a casa con su familia. Descubre cuál será su reacción al verla de nuevo. Además, Benito gana una audición para una serie.

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas
programme.desc: Luis está en problemas, ya que deberá armar un plan para evitar que lo echen de su trabajo. Además, doña Magda se actualiza en la moda y se pone uñas nuevas.

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Cumple Magda
programme.desc: Los vecinos le preparan una fiesta sorpresa a 'Doña Magda' con todo y payaso y piñata. Liz y Lorena participan en un casting para Blancanieves.

programme.title: La visita
programme.desc: Hipólito recibe la visita de su hermano gemelo. Jorjáis emprende un negocio como repartidor de comida y taxi.

programme.title: La herencia de los Rivers
programme.desc: El papá de Lorena se aparece en el departamento de los Rivers para anunciar que heredará a su hija en vida y Germán tiene problemas con los interfones

programme.title: Vidrio roto
programme.desc: Los López Pérez colocan en su departamento un cristal que era para la ventana de Luis y Pedro necesita usar lentes.

programme.title: Las llaves de Angangueo
programme.desc: Los López Pérez reciben una invitación para el evento más importante de Angangueo y Vanesa debe recuperar un perro extraviado de la veterinaria.

programme.title: Seguridad ante todo
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Germán que ponga en el departamento protecciones de seguridad para Luisito Jr. y Rocko hace casting para formar una banda de rock.

programme.title: Cumplemes
programme.desc: Vanesa olvida el cumplememes de Fabián y sus amigos le ayudan a preparar una sorpresa. Un alumno de Silvia le confiesa que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Tu nueva mamá
programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: A lo chino
programme.desc: Los López Pérez tienen un adeudo de agua y Luis les decomisa su televisión. Germán se enamora de Meche, la nueva nana de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: ¿Dónde está Rambo?
programme.desc: Pedro ha extraviado a Rambo y se deprime. La suegra de Alejandra quiere llevar a los López Pérez de vacaciones.

programme.title: Mollejitas 'Mi flaquita'
programme.desc: Arturo tiene la idea de poner un puesto callejero de comida. Pedro y Cris aplican técnicas de feng shui en el departamento para las buenas energías.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater- Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing

programme.title: Runaway Country with Alex Wagner (Trump Loses His Base)
programme.desc: Take one poll with a grain of salt, but what about a TON of polls? From white middle class voters, to rural Americans, and even Evangelicals, the numbers show that Trump is losing his most ardent supporters. This week Alex speaks to “The Clean Clothing Chick” Hannah Dunning, who explains why MAHA is disappointed with the president. Then she’s joined by the Bulwark’s Jonathan V. Last to find out what we can take away from Trump’s flailing public support, losing Iran deal, and stalled agenda.

programme.title: Hysteria (Choice Words with Franchesca Ramsey)
programme.desc: Franchesca Ramsey joins Erin and Alyssa to dig into Peter Thiel’s secret society leak, the 4-year anniversary of the Dobbs decision, and the TPUSA Women’s leadership summit. Alyssa shared her experience attending the star-studded opening of the Obama Center. Then they wrap with a petty conversation about Tulsi Gabbard, Trump’s health, and TV journalist drama.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Scum Like It Hot)
programme.desc: It’s Part 1 of our Lovett or Leave It Pride Show Extravaganza! This week, World Cup fans taste America and demand unlimited refills, Trump wants us to chug his Iran Kool-Aid, and D.C. bellies up to the bar for this summer’s trendiest algae cocktail. Hollywood legend Bruce Vilanch gives a gay side eye to early LGBTQ moments in film, while Myki Meeks decides which 2026 Pride Merch items should sashay away. And we taste the rainbow with a very gay round of I Don’t Care, I Lovett.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (The Pool is Always Greener)
programme.desc: JD Vance treads water on Iran, D.C. swan dives into Reflecting Pool chaos, and Trump lifts a glass to his brand-new Air Force One. This week, Matt Hamilton stops by to discuss local journalism, the L.A. mayoral race, and, of course, a plague of fire rats. Ali Siddiq and Ify Nwadiwe find out if Father really does know best with a round of Would You Rather?, and we have regrets like we’ve never had them before when we share our many, many Second Thoughts.

programme.title: What a Day (Trump, GOP Shouting Match)
programme.desc: President Trump has one clear talent: pissing off his purported allies, like when he was supposed to sign a big bipartisan housing bill. Republicans were hoping to campaign on the legislation and show that they care about the number one concern of American voters: the high cost of living. But Donald Trump doesn't care. Wednesday morning, he abruptly canceled the signing ceremony without telling Republican members of Congress, declaring he won't sign the bill until Congress passes the SAVE America Act. This massive federal elections bill would require Americans to show their passport or birth certificate to vote. To talk more about how Trump seems determined to derail Congress, even when it hurts his own party, we spoke with Maryland Democratic Senator Chris Van Hollen. And in headlines, the U.S. military reinstates flu shot requirements for recruits after an outbreak at a Texas Air Force base, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani won big in Tuesday’s primary, and a federal judge permanently bars the Trump administration from implementing most of Trump’s first executive order on elections.

programme.title: Never Take Your Wife To A Convention
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: The Computer Age
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: The Vulgar Ring Story
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Who's Lisa
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville�and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Music To Milk By
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: The Man For The Job
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Eb Elopes
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Portrait Of Gomez
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Morticia's Dilemma
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter, Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: Christmas With The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fill in for him.

programme.title: Uncle Fester, Tycoon
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: Morticia & Gomez Vs. Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Fester Goes On A Diet
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: Ophelia Finds Romance
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: Pugsley's Allowance
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: Happy Birthday, Grandma Frump
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton) comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: Morticia, The Decorator
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: Addams Cum Laude
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: Cat Addams
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can affect cures.

programme.title: Lurch's Little Helper
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: 44 Harsh Truths About The Game Of Life
programme.desc: What does it mean to win at the game of life? Is it tons of wealth, pure happiness, infinite time, or a loving family? Today we explore the timeless question of what it means to truly live well. Expect to learn the true price of success, whether sacrificing your happiness is worth it, what advice Naval would give to his younger self, what the true source of unhappiness is for most people, how to overcome low self-esteem, what Naval would add to his ‘How To Get Rich’ thread, how to become comfortable being unapologetically selfish, what Naval sees as the next big trends in science and technology, his take on the escalating culture wars, how to get comfortable with death and overcoming grief, the best and worst ways to spend your wealth and much more…

programme.title: How To Overcome The Worst Pain Of Your Life
programme.desc: From Hollywood’s biggest star to a near-tragic ending, Jeremy Renner’s comeback is a story of pain, recovery, and incredible resilience. How did the Oscar nominee fight to bounce back, and what’s next now that he’s fully recovered? Expect to learn the real story of what happened to Jeremy during the snowplow accident, what it feels like to get run over and see your eyeball fall out of it’s socket, how Jeremy was able to recover so well and look as just as he did before the accident, how to deal with excruciating amount of pain, how Jeremy’s meditation practices came in handy during his darkest hours, what it was like being a part of The Avengers & the craziness of being one of the biggest stars in the world, and much more…

programme.title: 41 Harsh Truths Nobody Wants To Admit
programme.desc: Alex’s Twitter has been one of my favourite sources of insights over the last few years. Today we get to go through some of his best lessons about life, human behaviour, psychology, business and resilience again. And as always this is so, so good. Expect to learn the skills needed to thrive in todays every changing world, why a few bad days shouldn’t ruin the rest of your year, how Alex’s mind has changed about work and happiness in the past year, how to figure out what you want in life, the rare dynamic between Alex and his wife Leila, why having a work life balance isn’t all it’s cracked up to be, why more money won’t buy you more happiness, how to get a top tier girls and much more…

She, her parents and boyfriend decide the a married with a dying man will be the solution of the problem. So, Carita marries Lazaro (who is dying)accepts the situation, but when he sees his fiancé, he recovers health. Lazaro disappear because he was unable to fulfill his compromise. Some days later a newspaper announces Lazaro's death. Nevertheless he reappears suddenly and explains that he is not Lazaro, the real one has died so Carita is a widow and can receive her inheritance. Lazaro and Carita fall in love and marry.
